title: RTX_ON
description: This modpack offers a number of changes and improvements aimed at improving the combat system and adding realistic graphical elements like: realistic graphics, better combat sistem and so much more.
body:
### **Warning! From version 2.1 you must have 8GB of RAM, or more to normal modpack working.**


Immerse yourself in the world of Minecraft like never before with the **RTX On** modpack! This modpack combines some of the best shaders such as **Complementary Reimagined** and **Ethropia Patches** to create stunning graphics with realistic lighting, shadows and reflections. Your adventures will be made even more exciting with effects that fill the world with new colors and atmosphere.

**RTX On** also offers improved world generation with an increased world size of up to **1024 blocks in height**, allowing you to create larger and more diverse landscapes. In addition, the game's physics have been significantly improved, making the behavior of elytra more realistic. You will now be able to enjoy smoother and more controlled flight, giving your adventures a new level of thrills.

Join us on a journey through stunning Minecraft locations with the **RTX On** modpack and discover new horizons in gameplay!
